reason: Authoritative lint + test bar — verify dart format, flutter analyze, flutter test all pass; widget tests for AboutScreen (icon/name/description/version + 3 ListTile entries) and SettingsScreen entry tap are present and green.
Re-verify widget structure on every touched widget — const constructors, prop ordering, MD3 surfaces (no manual Container backgrounds), ListTile/Card composition, ClipRRect for icon corners.
Re-verify about page renders within reasonable max content width on expanded/large window classes and does not regress settings branch responsive behavior.
Re-verify url_launcher failure path surfaces a Chinese SnackBar (not a silent failure or English exception trace).

Re-verify pubspec deps additions (package_info_plus / url_launcher) use sane version constraints, assets section properly declares assets/icon/, and any required iOS/Android manifest entries for url_launcher are in place.
Re-verify version label composition is null-/empty-safe; PackageInfo mock in tests covers the empty-buildNumber web case.
Re-verify file placement: about_screen.dart under features/settings/presentation/screens/, app_info constants under core/constants/, assets binary under assets/icon/.
